title: I'm sitting on the Berkley deck, surrounded by the faint scent of last summer...
excerpt: As I look out at the garden, I start thinking about the systems I've built for remote work. I've always tried to create structures that can outlast me, that can continue to function even if I'm not...

external: Most decisions are emotional first, rational second.
